name: Guideline for Safety Management of Information Systems and Services Provided by Operators Handling Medical Information
owner: Ministry of Economy, Trade and Industry + Ministry of Internal Affairs and Communications, Japan (METI + MIC)
description: Version 2.0, March 2025. Extends the MHLW medical-info-systems-safety guideline's requirements to third-party IT/cloud vendors hosting or processing medical information on behalf of healthcare providers -- directly covers cloud shared-responsibility obligations.
relationToCloudSecurity: See registry/control/mhlw.go.jp.json in the SecID repo (CloudSecurityAlliance/SecID) for cloud/AI security relevance notes on this source.
relationToAISecurity: See the paired SecID registry entry.

license.notes: Issued directly by a national government ministry/agency as an official notification/circular -- plausibly excluded from copyright under Japan's Copyright Act Article 13(2) ("notifications, instructions, circulars, and other documents similar thereto issued by national or local government organs"), but this is a less clear-cut case than primary legislation (Art. 13(1)) and has not been legally verified. Treat as moderate-confidence permitted, not certain.

current_extraction.notes: Full text acquired (Japanese; no English version). meti.go.jp blocks curl/WebFetch (HTTP 403) but a real Playwright browser session succeeded -- fetched via in-page fetch() and base64 round-trip.
